zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Bechton於大約1297年出生在英國爾貝頓時，她的父親Phillip de Bechton23歲，母親Ellen of England31歲。她於1318年與Peter de Legh of Bechton在英國英格蘭爾貝頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Bechton于大约1297年出生在英国爾貝頓时，她的父亲Phillip de Bechton23岁，母亲Ellen of England31岁。她于1318年与Peter de Legh of Bechton在英国英格兰爾貝頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bechton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern) and Scottish: habitational name from Beckton near Lockerbie in Dumfriesshire. The placename is from Old Norse bekkr ‘beck, stream’, + tūn ‘farm, village’. The surname is not from Beckton in East Ham (Essex), which is named for the 19th-century gas and coal magnate S. A. Beck. Compare Becton .

variants.name: Becton
meanings: Scottish and English: altered form of   Beckton  .

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Bechton was born about 1297, in Bechton, Cheshire, England, her father, Phillip de Bechton, was 23 and her mother, Ellen of England, was 31. She married Peter de Legh of Bechton in 1318, in Bechton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She was buried in Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Bechton est née environ 1297, à Bechton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Phillip de Bechton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Ellen of England, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Peter de Legh of Bechton en 1318, à Bechton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elleenterrée à Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Bechton um 1297 in Bechton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Phillip de Bechton 23 und ihre Mutter Ellen of England 31. Sie hat 1318 in Bechton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Peter de Legh of Bechton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie wurde in Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Bechton è nata il circa 1297 nel Bechton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Phillip de Bechton, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Ellen of England, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Peter de Legh of Bechton nel 1318, nel Bechton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Fu sepolta a Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Bechtonが約1297年にイギリスチェシュアイアベチトンで生まれた時，父Phillip de Bechtonは23歳，母Ellen of Englandは31歳であった。1318年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアベチトンでPeter de Legh of Bechtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスチェシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Bechton(이)가 대략 1297년 영국 체실르 베ch턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Phillip de Bechton(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen of England(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 베ch턴에서 Peter de Legh of Bechton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 체실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Bechton nasceu aproximadamente 1297, em Bechton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Phillip de Bechton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Ellen of England, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Peter de Legh of Bechton em 1318, em Bechton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Bechton родилась около 1297 г. в местности бечтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Phillip de Bechton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen of England, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter de Legh of Bechton в 1318 г. в местности бечтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen Bechton nació aproximadamente 1297, en Bechton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Phillip de Bechton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Ellen of England, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Peter de Legh of Bechton en 1318, en Bechton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Fue sepultada en Cheshire, Inglaterra.
